content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves gently to the left ahead with the dashed center line visible, and the car appears well-positioned on the track following the curve.

**Waypoint analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 105, target index = (105+5) % 121 = 110
- WP110: x=1.253116, y=1.088540
- Car: x=1.184964, y=1.161361, heading=-61.285°
- dy = 1.088540 - 1.161361 = -0.072821
- dx = 1.253116 - 1.184964 = +0.068152
- bearing = atan2(-0.072821, 0.068152) = atan2(-0.072821, 0.068152) ≈ -46.89°
- delta = -46.89° - (-61.285°) = +14.40°
- Normalize: +14.40° → steer LEFT

**Boundary check:**
- is_left_of_center = false (right of center)
- edge_distance = (0.7613/2) - 0.03703 = 0.3807 - 0.03703 = 0.3436m → OK (>0.20m)
- delta = +14.40° → steer left (away from right edge) → safe

|delta| 5-15°: speed=1.5, steering_angle=+5

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves gently left ahead, car slightly right of center, delta≈+14.4° requires mild left steering to stay on the waypoint line toward WP110.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track total 121 waypoints, ~17.7m length.",
    "WP0-20: long straight along y≈0.683 heading east.",
    "WP24-44: left curve from east to west, requires sustained positive steering.",
    "WP44-55: straight westward along y≈2.77.",
    "WP82-96: sharp south/southeast curve — large positive delta, need max left steering.",
    "WP97-112: heading ~-60 to -90°, continuing left curve — delta decreasing as car aligns.",
    "Car consistently slightly right of center (distance_from_center ~0.03-0.18m) in WP100-110 region.",
    "When |delta|>50°, use steering_angle=+25 at speed=0.75.",
    "When |delta| 15-30°, use steering_angle=+10 to +15 at speed=1.5.",
    "When |delta| 5-15°, use steering_angle=+5 at speed=1.5 to avoid oversteer."
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [1.065, 1.108, 1.143, 1.185],
    "y": [1.274, 1.232, 1.196, 1.161],
    "heading": [-74.397, -68.703, -65.667, -61.285]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP110 at (1.253, 1.089): bearing≈-46.9°, delta≈+14.4° → mild left correction needed.",
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": 5.0
}
```
